security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* data:

bundle.shortDescription: ZeroClaw Desktop — system tray client for the ZeroClaw agent runtime
bundle.longDescription: Tray-resident desktop client that pairs with a local ZeroClaw daemon via the gateway for chat, status, and memory access.
